description: Places a bracket-style dimension marker between two UV positions on a surface. UV values are 0–1 ratios.
utility: Add a dimension marker between two points on a 3D surface

arguments.name: surface
arguments.description: The surface to place the marker on (plot3d, paraplot3d)

arguments.name: u1
arguments.description: U coordinate of the start point

arguments.name: v1
arguments.description: V coordinate of the start point

arguments.name: u2
arguments.description: U coordinate of the end point

arguments.name: v2
arguments.description: V coordinate of the end point

arguments.name: height
arguments.description: Bracket offset from the surface along its normal

arguments.name: label
arguments.description: Optional label text for the marker

arguments.name: buff
arguments.description: Optional UV buffer offset for the marker endpoints

alternates.syntax: curvemarker3d(G, surface, u1, v1, u2, v2, height)
alternates.description: Bracket marker between two UV positions

alternates.syntax: curvemarker3d(G, surface, u1, v1, u2, v2, height, "label")
curvemarker3d(G, surface, u1, v1, u2, v2, height, "label", arrowhead(), buff(u, v))

examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(10,10), view(30, 30))
S = plot3d(G, "sin(x)*cos(y)")
curvemarker3d(G, S, 0.2, 0.3, 0.8, 0.3, 0.3, "width", arrowhead())
